examples.title: Classes and Objects
examples.description: An example of a class and object in pseudocode
examples.code:
CLASS Person
  ATTRIBUTES name, age
  METHODS sayHello()
END CLASS

OBJECT person
  name = 'John'
  age = 30
END OBJECT
examples.explanation: This pseudocode example illustrates the concept of classes and objects in OOP

examples.title: Inheritance
examples.description: An example of inheritance in C++
examples.explanation: This C++ example illustrates the concept of inheritance in OOP
